dataset: Yahoo Finance historical OHLCV data for SPY, AAPL, MSFT

pi_items.source: Yahoo Finance - SPY is State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE Arca), AAPL is Apple Inc. (NASDAQ), MSFT is Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ). Data files verified: SPY.Last.txt, AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt exist with 502 trading days each (Jan 3, 2023 - Dec 31, 2024)

NinjaTrader 8 official documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/moving_average_-_simple_sma.htm) confirms SimpleMovingAverage is the built-in SMA indicator. README files in similar tasks confirm indicator detection uses pattern 'SMA'/"SimpleMovingAverage" in workspace XML files.

Technical analysis standard - the 50-period SMA is one of the most common periods used in trading, representing intermediate trend analysis. Sources: Fidelity, Capital.com, TradingView, Charles Schwab confirm SMA-50 is a standard trading indicator period alongside 200-day SMA.

Microsoft Learn Windows color definitions (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.windows.media.colors). All colors are valid System.Windows.Media.Colors properties used in WPF/Windows applications. Green=#FF008000, Lime=#FF00FF00, LightGreen=#FF90EE90, DarkGreen=#FF006400, SeaGreen=#FF2E8B57 (RGB 46,139,87)

Microsoft Learn Windows color definitions (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.windows.media.colors). All colors are valid System.Windows.Media.Colors properties. LightCoral=#FFF08080 (RGB 240,128,128), Crimson=#FFDC143C, Pink supported in Brushes collection, DarkRed=#FF8B0000

env.json user account configuration lists 'Docker' user with default home directory structure. NinjaTrader 8 workspace files are typically stored in Documents\\NinjaTrader 8\\workspaces. Task description and similar tasks reference this exact path.
env.json id field matches exactly. Environment uses Windows 11 with NinjaTrader 8 installed.
Direct file inspection of data/*.txt files: each contains exactly 502 rows of OHLCV data in format Date;Open;High;Low;Close;Volume. First row: 20230103, Last row: 20241231

pi_items.verified_value: OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) in format Date;Open;High;Low;Close;Volume
pi_items.source: File inspection of SPY.Last.txt, AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt showing format: 20230103;384.37;386.43;377.83;380.82;74850700

pi_items.metadata_value: If Last price > SMA(50) -> Green, If Last price < SMA(50) -> Red
pi_items.verified_value: Conditional logic for Cell Conditions: price > indicator = bullish color, price < indicator = bearish color
pi_items.source: Task description states: 'If Last price is Greater than SMA(50) -> Set Background to Green (or Lime/LightGreen). If Last price is Less than SMA(50) -> Set Background to Red (or Pink/LightCoral)'

privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring NinjaTrader 8 Market Analyzer with real Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV data for three major financial instruments: SPY (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust), AAPL (Apple Inc.), and MSFT (Microsoft Corporation). Data spans 502 trading days from January 3, 2023 through December 31, 2024. The task requires implementing conditional cell formatting using the SimpleMovingAverage (SMA) indicator with a 50-period setting to color-code the Last price column: bullish colors (Green, Lime, LightGreen, DarkGreen, SeaGreen) when price exceeds SMA(50), and bearish colors (Red, Crimson, LightCoral, Pink, DarkRed) when price falls below SMA(50). All color names are verified valid Windows System.Windows.Media.Colors. The 50-period SMA is an industry-standard technical analysis indicator. Data is stored in NinjaTrader-formatted files and the workspace configuration should be saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.
